hooks.command: export PATH="/usr/local/n/versions/node/22.12.0/bin:$PATH"; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *packages/frontend*) cd '/media/phuon/Phuong Ubuntu/Claude/email-marketing-system' && yarn workspace frontend typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; *packages/backend*) cd '/media/phuon/Phuong Ubuntu/Claude/email-marketing-system' && yarn workspace backend build 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac; exit 0

export PATH="/usr/local/n/versions/node/22.12.0/bin:$PATH"; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; case "$f" in *packages/frontend*) cd '/media/phuon/Phuong Ubuntu/Claude/email-marketing-system/packages/frontend' && ./node_modules/.bin/eslint "$f" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; *packages/backend*) cd '/media/phuon/Phuong Ubuntu/Claude/email-marketing-system/packages/backend' && ./node_modules/.bin/eslint "$f" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac; exit 0
